title: Garden Route gets podium spots at triathle world champs
bodyText:
Gallery

GARDEN ROUTE NEWS -  The results for the individual triathle at the UIPM Biathle, Triathle and Laser Run World Championships are in.


> Garden Route athletes won two gold medals and one bronze during the triathle finals which took place on Thursday 11 December.


The top podium spots went to Mia Botha (junior women) from Great Brak River and Johan Windt (masters 70+ men) from Mossel Bay. Gavin Gericke from George earned himself bronze in the masters 60+ men.

Another Western Cape athlete, Liesel Wessels (masters 50+ women) from Bonnievale, also stood out, having registered a better time with her first place than the masters 40+ women.

Today, Saturday, 13 December is the last day of the championships with athletes still battling it out for top spots in the laser run finals.See the full individual triathle results below:U9 girls• 1st: Kinda Sror (EGY)• 2nd: Lumay de Beer (RSA)• 3rd: Shoana Schofield (RSA)U9 boys• 1st: Mohammad Nassar (EGY)• 2nd: Karlo Marais (RSA)• 3rd: Lealdo Wessels (RSA)U11 girls• 1st: Roqia Abd Alsalam (EGY)• 2nd: Asiel Magd Aldin (EGY)• 3rd: Ana Malysheva Anishchyk (ESP)U11 boys• 1st: Hilton Vos (RSA)• 2nd: Ahmed Gad Allah (EGY)• 3rd: Markú Loubser (RSA)U13 girls• 1st: Keyla Douglas (RSA)• 2nd: Zoe Janse van Vuuren (RSA)U15 boys• 1st: Abdallah Abdallah (EGY)• 2nd: Gasir Rashad (EGY)• 3rd: Vakhtang Kankia (GEO)U17 girls• 1st: Jessica Matthysen (RSA)• 2nd: Lara Janse van Rensburg (RSA)• 3rd: Annabelle Rogan (UK)U17 boys• 1st: Daniel Grove (RSA)• 2nd: Giann Wessels (RSA)• 3rd: Bradly Leppan (RSA)U19 girls• 1st: Megan Kleynhans (RSA)• 2nd: Simone van der Merwe (RSA)• 3rd: Evelina Powell (UK)U19 boys• 1st: Steffan Hillebrand (RSA)• 2nd: Tylor Kroef (RSA)• 3rd: Cayden Potgieter (RSA)Junior women• 1st: Mia Botha (RSA) • 2nd: Bhumi Agrawal (IND)• 3rd: Danny Pienaar (RSA)Junior men• 1st: Giorgi Tskhadadze (GEO)• 2nd: Stefan Barenthaler (AUT)• 3rd: Athanasios Spantouros (GRE)Masters 40+ women• 1st: Andrea Ranger (RSA)• 2nd: Helen Wilkinson (RSA)• 3rd: Andra Novicka (LAT)Masters 40+ men• 1st: Tiaan Rossouw (RSA)• 2nd: Antonio Sanchez Paraja (ESP)• 3rd: Johan Michelosi (FRA)Masters 50+ women• 1st: Liesel Wessels (RSA) • 2nd: Jené Banfield (RSA)• 3rd: Sunet Eybers (RSA)Masters 50+ men• 1st: Corne Lotz (RSA)• 2nd: Rupert Groenewald (RSA)• 3rd: Jean-Christophe Perrier (FRA)Masters 60+ women• 1st: Lynette Fischer (RSA)• 2nd: Jillian Wallace (UK)• 3rd: Linda du Bruyn (RSA)Masters 60+ men• 1st: Francisco Alonso (ESP)• 2nd: Adriaan Vermaas (RSA)• 3rd: Gavin Gericke (RSA) Masters 70+ women• 1st: Emily Freund (GER)• 2nd: Mary Collett (UK)• 3rd: Stephanie Claassen (RSA)Masters 70+ men• 1st: Johan Windt (RSA) • 2nd: Dr. Kurt Tohermes (GER)• 3rd: Coenraad Janse van Vuuren (RSA)
